ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Continued To Sep-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Continued To Aug-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Tanaka appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that it still doesn't have a proper notice of the petition and that it has to be properly served. Mr. Tanaka stated that he filed a petition the other week at the window and that he did not understand what the Court means. The Court stated that probate is tough, that there a lot of rules that need to be followed, that the process is very complicated for a personal representative to take upon himself and encouraged Mr. Tanaka to get an Attorney. The Court also informed Mr. Tanaka that he has to provide courtesy copies of the petition to the Court, that there are local rules, statutory rules and government rules that need to be followed, that it can not go forward with the petition because of lack of notice and lack of receiving courtesy copies, instructed Mr. Tanaka to deliver the copies to Dept. 204 and asked for status of the property. Mr. Tanaka stated that he is cleaning out the property, that he is paying the taxes and insurance, and that no one is living there. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account is continued to August 21, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court instructed Mr. Tanaka to make sure he adequately provides notice for that date and to deliver courtesy copies to Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2019 Continued To Jul-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor to appear on December 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Tanaka in Propria Persona.

The Court inquires as to what research or preparation Mr. Tanaka has done. Mr. Tanaka stated that he bought a book, that he has spoken with some real estate agents who have attorneys, that he has looked on the internet and that who is looking for an Attorney to assist him. The Court informed Mr. Tanaka that he is being appointed with limited authority and that he can not sell any property without Court approval. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary with limited authority (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. The Court informed Mr. Tanaka that it will appoint a Probate Referee. Status on filing of an inventory and appraisal is set for November 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for December 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
